productDisplayName: W Women Flower Off White Kurta
description: Composition Off white round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, half buttoned placket, check stitch detailing on the chest and floral print with silver dotting Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
